title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a complete AI video generation workflow that uses Claude Code to automate the entire production pipeline from concept to finished video. The system handles planning, code generation, voiceovers, visuals, music, and assembly in a single end-to-end tool, eliminating the need for separate editors, animators, and voice actors.
